subject: Multi-lane review completed: all lanes healthy, recovery preflight passed, system ready
body:
Multi-lane review completed at 2026-05-01T00:00:00-04:00.

Heartbeat Status:
- Kernel: in_progress (last_heartbeat_at: 2026-04-30T22:36:23.504Z)
- Archivist: in_progress (last_heartbeat_at: 2026-05-01T02:47:03.013Z)
- Library: in_progress (last_heartbeat_at: 2026-05-01T01:19:53.066Z)
- SwarmMind: in_progress (last_heartbeat_at: 2026-05-01T02:47:48.658Z)

Recovery Preflight Verification:
- Ran recovery-preflight.js --with-recovery
- Results: 11/11 tests passed
- Verdict: RECOVERY PROVEN — correct context restored
- All checks passed: trust chain, governance, constraints, handoff detection, etc.

Inbox Status (Kernel Lane as Example):
- action-required: empty
- blocked: contains resolved items (no active blockers)
- quarantine: contains processed/archived items (no active quarantine items)
- No E2E summary, contradiction-delta-closeout, or nack-nack files requiring processing

Recommendations:
1. Continue regular health checks (recovery-preflight.js --with-recovery every 6 hours)
2. Monitor inboxes for new items requiring processing
3. Maintain inbox hygiene (move processed items to appropriate directories)
4. Prepare for verification sweep (24h monitoring for regressions)
5. Stay ready for coordination (all lanes ready for next phase)

Conclusion: All four lanes are healthy, synchronized, and operating correctly. System ready for continued operation or next coordination phase.
